source_title: Long-context RAG paper questions the end of retrieval
claim: The paper argues retrieval remains useful for citation faithfulness even with large context windows.
snippet: Long-context RAG paper questions the end of retrieval: The paper argues retrieval remains useful for citation faithfulness even with large context windows.

source_title: OpenAI updates model evaluation guidance for agentic systems
claim: The guidance emphasizes task-level evals, traces, and human review for agent workflows.
snippet: OpenAI updates model evaluation guidance for agentic systems: The guidance emphasizes task-level evals, traces, and human review for agent workflows.

source_title: RAG Under Long Context: When Retrieval Still Matters
claim: The evaluation varies context length, retriever quality, and citation constraints to isolate where RAG adds value.
snippet: This work evaluates retrieval-augmented generation when frontier models can read long contexts.
risk_note: 实验结论需要人工阅读 PDF 后确认细节和指标。
